Once, Qualinesti was a place of natural beauty, unequalled throughout western Ansalon! It housed Qualinost, one of the most striking cities ever to have graced the surface of Krynn, and its forests were filled with the gay laughter of the Qualinesti elves. The War of the Lance ended that golden era. The Qualinesti elves were driven from Qualinost and banished from their land by the iron-fisted Lord Verminaard and his devastating dragon armies.
